char_overview: Founder of 鹤望兰工坊 whose multi-morphing weapons are sought after by elite 狩灵. A perfectionist artisan who judges finished pieces by the sound of their gears.
char_looks: Short black hair. Black eyes. Wears a black top and black shorts daily, switching to heavy-duty protective gear when working outside. None. Workshop role focuses on equipment manufacturing; rarely participates in combat.
char_flaws: Prone to overworking. Poor at bargaining. Vulnerable in direct combat without preparation.
char_abilities: 灵力回路-磁流: Controls electron flow within metal using 灵力, magnetizing or demagnetizing at will. Used primarily in crafting.
char_mission: Craft weapons few can afford and fewer can wield. For those who clear both, the return is absolute.

char_relationships.千乐: Commissioned 美工刀, her most complex multi-mode weapon. Still drafts improvement proposals for him.
char_relationships.奏: Commissioned 暴行 with split-blade functionality. Once she understood the brief, delivered a single finished piece with no revisions. An ideal client: specifications stated once, no indecision, no late-stage redesigns.
